ticket:
Hello,

My name is Emily Johnson.
Email: emily.johnson@email.com

Order 88771 stopped working after three months.

I would like to claim my warranty.

plan.reason: Customer is reporting a technical issue with their order and would like to claim warranty, lookup tools are required to verify customer and order information

classification.reason: Customer is reporting a product malfunction and wants to claim warranty

email.subject: Re: Warranty Claim for Order 88771
email.body: Dear Emily Johnson, thank you for reaching out. I've checked the status of your order 88771, which was delivered. I'm happy to assist you with your warranty claim. Please allow me to review your case further.
